suite.name: Enhanced SEO Broken Links Testing
suite.description: Enhanced test cases for VCST-3156 covering identified gaps

custom.preconds: Two stores configured: Store-A and Store-B

step.content: 1. Navigate to Store-A storefront and access non-existent URL 2. Switch to admin and select Store-A context 3. Verify broken link appears in Store-A grid only 4. Create broken link in Store-B 5. Verify stores show only their own broken links
step.expected: Each store shows only its own broken links

step.content: 1. Open broken link in Store-A 2. Attempt to set redirect to Store-B product 3. Verify validation prevents cross-store redirects
1. Open broken link for editing 2. Enter redirect to non-existent product 3. Verify validation error appears 4. Enter redirect to valid product 5. Verify save succeeds
1. Create redirect from /page-a to /page-b 2. Create redirect from /page-b to /page-a 3. Verify system prevents infinite loops
step.expected: Circular redirects are detected and prevented

step.content: 1. Execute seoSlug GraphQL query for non-existent URL 2. Verify broken link event is logged 3. Verify broken link appears in admin grid 4. Verify hit count increments on repeat access
step.expected: GraphQL integration creates broken link entries correctly

step.content: 1. Access non-existent URL from frontend 2. Verify broken link logged in backend 3. Set redirect in admin 4. Test redirect from frontend 5. Verify complete workflow functions
step.expected: Complete broken link resolution workflow works end-to-end
